name: getsale-crm
description: AI CRM SaaS - Enterprise Microservices Platform

scripts.build:v2: npm run build -w shared-v2/types -w shared-v2/logger -w shared-v2/events && npm run build -w shared-v2/cache -w shared-v2/queue -w shared-v2/service-framework -w shared-v2/telegram && npm run build -w services-v2/gateway -w services-v2/auth-service -w services-v2/core-api -w services-v2/messaging-api -w services-v2/telegram-session-manager -w services-v2/campaign-orchestrator -w services-v2/campaign-worker -w services-v2/automation-engine -w services-v2/notification-hub -w services-v2/analytics-worker -w services-v2/user-service -w services-v2/ai-service
